findings.description: The knowledge file table adds a 'デフォルト値' column that does not exist in the source table. The source only has columns: 設定項目 / プロパティ名 / データ型 / 備考. All cells in the added column are empty, so no concrete value is fabricated, but the column structure itself has no basis in the source.
findings.source_evidence: Source table headers: 設定項目 | プロパティ名 | データ型　| 備考 (no デフォルト値 column)

findings.description: RST cross-reference syntax ':doc:`../architectural_pattern/messaging_receive`' is left verbatim in the knowledge file markdown content. This RST-specific notation has no meaning outside of Sphinx/RST rendering and will appear as raw markup to AI consumers of the knowledge file.
findings.source_evidence: Source: ':doc:`../architectural_pattern/messaging_receive` における典型的な業務アクションハンドラの実装' — this is valid RST, but the knowledge file should convert it to plain text (e.g., 'messaging_receive パターン')
